description: dashboard route uses Array.from(runtime.cachedFrames.values())[0] and runtime.manualOverride instead of AdminStateService
impact: Dashboard state inconsistent with admin state
fix: Call adminStateService.getAdminState() and derive response from it

description: cleanupTitle function uses .slice(0,55), .slice(0,bestCut), and .slice(0,20) for direct truncation without semantic processing
impact: Titles may be cut mid-word, losing meaning

description: News draft route rejects titles longer than 24 chars with hard error, bypassing NewsTitleService
impact: Users cannot submit long titles for semantic processing
fix: Remove hard limit; use NewsTitleService for normalization

description: handleAdminRoutes imported but never called in request handler. GET /api/admin/state does not exist.
fix: Call handleAdminRoutes for admin paths or integrate GET /api/admin/state

description: News draft route returns {status:'ok'} without returning processed items from server. Frontend cannot sync state.
impact: Frontend has outdated local state after save
fix: Return processed items after NewsTitleService normalization

description: Photo thumbnail uses old validateSafeImagePath from src/safety/ instead of new SafeImagePath from src/files/

impact: Image pipeline not unified, recipe/processing hashes not generated

description: system/status route uses adminQueryService instead of AdminStateService
impact: System page uses different state source from dashboard

description: AUTO restore returns {status:'ok'} without read-back verification
impact: Frontend reports success even if restore failed silently
fix: Verify state after restore, return state or error

description: Read-back failure in doPublish throws error but activation is already committed; no rollback mechanism
checkConsistency has comment for lastPublication vs snapshotId mismatch but doesn't flag it as inconsistency
news route uses zhTitle/zhSummary field names instead of displayTitle/rawTitle
impact: Frontend may show truncated or wrong title field
